'''Feldrall Okor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who had been attacking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipment's in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Isis (Governor)|Isis]] was based in. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] captured him for the governor after she put a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on him. Okor lost an [[Limb/Legends|arm]] in the process. When Fett brought Okor to Isis's office, he demanded 100,000 credits for the pirate, and when Isis refused, Fett activated a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]]. Fett continued to increase the price of the bounty and eventually Isis agreed to pay 150,000 credits for Feldrall Okor.
